title: Blick Brand Explainer
purpose: 30-second brand explainer for blick.group — introduces Blick to new visitors, covers what we do, why choose us, and ends with a clear CTA.
audience: Prospective drilling customers in AU/NZ. Owner-operators and site managers, 40s–60s, practical and direct.

scenes.name: Hero
scenes.notes: Orange sweep wipe reveals headline on black. Tagline + sub-copy. Brand confidence play.

scenes.name: Three Pillars
scenes.message: Quality that performs / There when you need us / Your expert partner
scenes.notes: Dark background, three cards stagger in. Maps directly to brand voice pillars from Brand Voice Guide.

scenes.name: Close
scenes.notes: Full orange close. Strong brand colour finish. blick.group URL. Brand tagline quote.

brand.font: Nunito Sans (Proxima Nova substitute — web safe)

nextSteps: Review scene timing — is 12s on pillars long enough to read?
Add Blick logo SVG asset (currently B lettermark only)
Consider adding a field photography background to Scene 1
Render to MP4 once approved: cd blick-explainer && npx hyperframes render
Decide on music/voiceover — silent or narrated?
